title: poa borneensis
intro: Poa borneensis, also known as Borneo Blue Grass, is a species of grass that is native to Borneo and is a type of perennial grass. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Poa borneensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
